findings.body: STAGE_EVIDENCE_INFOS duplicates the stage-to-filename data also encoded in buildRequiredEvidencePaths; consolidate into a single shared stage evidence definition so filenames and stage numbers are defined once.
findings.disposition: Repaired locally by adding a shared stage evidence definition with stage label and filename metadata, and by deriving required evidence paths from that definition.
